name: yaca-pi-parity
title: yaca: broad feature parity with pi
description: Bring yaca to broad (Tier 3) functional parity with the pi coding agent: fix the edit/write/shell permission blocker, add project-context loading, missing tools (ls/find), slash commands, compaction, skills, more providers + OAuth, session tree, and RPC/print/JSON modes. Phased parent task; children own each wave.
creator: cydia2001
